data.body:
AC amendment: .tmp file cleanup on compaction failure — The _compact_preconditions() function must clean up <ts>-<uuid>-PRECONDITIONS-SNAPSHOT.json.tmp if the atomic rename fails (filesystem error). Use a local trap or manual rm in the error path. Add acceptance criterion:
- [ ] No .tmp files left behind when _compact_preconditions() fails mid-operation
  Verify: In test_compact_preconditions_writes_snapshot, simulate a rename failure (chmod -w on target dir) and assert no *.tmp files remain after the function exits
